hero.title: GoPick Assessment Center
hero.subtitle: The complete browser-based platform for building, scheduling, delivering, and reporting on online assessments — from item banks to detailed candidate reports.

features.title: Account Management
features.description: Create and manage a full hierarchy of organizational accounts — distributors, clients, sub-accounts — with role-based access control.

features.title: Assessment Management
features.description: Build tests from scratch, import via spreadsheet, configure timers & randomization, and organize assessments by category.

features.title: Candidate Management
features.description: Register candidates individually or in bulk, manage profiles, assign credentials, and track assignment history.

features.title: Scheduling & Delivery
features.description: Assign assessments to individuals or groups with optional date windows, and deliver tests securely through the candidate portal.

features.title: Results & Reporting
features.description: View individual and group-level results, download PDF/Excel reports, and compare scores against configurable test norms.

features.title: Video Interviews
features.description: Create video interview question sets, collect recorded candidate responses, and review them with built-in scoring tools.

roles.name: Administrator
roles.description: Manages all accounts, assessments, candidates, results, and system-wide settings including branding, email templates, and security.

roles.name: Distributor
roles.description: Manages multiple client accounts, oversees their assessments and candidates, and views aggregated results across their client base.

roles.name: Client Manager
roles.description: Manages candidates within their own organization, assigns assessments, monitors progress, and views results.

roles.name: Candidate
roles.description: Logs in through the candidate portal, completes assigned assessments, and views results when permitted.

modules.name: Dashboard
modules.description: Real-time overview of active candidates, in-progress assessments, scheduled sessions, and result summaries with date filters.

modules.name: Content Manager
modules.description: Manage privacy policies, consent notices, completion pages, and candidate-facing branding across all portals.

modules.name: Email Templates
modules.description: Customizable automated emails for registration, assignment notifications, and result delivery — branded per organization.

modules.name: Meter & Usage
modules.description: Track assessment credits, configure meter orders, and monitor usage across all accounts and time periods.

modules.name: Activity Logging
modules.description: Full audit trail of logins, assessment completions, and administrative actions — filterable by candidate, account, or date.

modules.name: Test Security
modules.description: Anti-cheating controls including navigation restrictions, session monitoring, and suspicious behavior flagging.

about: GoPick is a browser-based, multi-tenant assessment platform purpose-built for organizations that need to create, administer, and manage online assessments at scale. It supports the full assessment lifecycle — from building item banks, to scheduling and delivering tests, to producing detailed candidate reports. A single installation can serve multiple independent client organizations, each managing their own candidates and results through a role-based hierarchy.

admin.label: Admin & Manager Portal
admin.description: Where Administrators, Distributors, and Client Managers log in to manage accounts, assessments, candidates, and reports.

candidate.label: Candidate Portal
candidate.description: Where candidates log in to take assigned assessments. Supports self-registration when enabled.

access.help: If you cannot log in, contact your site administrator. Accounts are created by Administrators or Client Managers.

hierarchy.title: Account Hierarchy
hierarchy.description: GoPick uses a nested account structure. Each level inherits access from its parent and manages the resources below it.
